title: cyrtomium hookerianum
intro: Cyrtomium hookerianum, also known as the Hooker's fern or the autumn fern, is a species of evergreen fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. The medicinal properties of Cyrtomium hookerianum lie in its ability to be used as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cyrtomium hookerianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and use in traditional medicine.
